revision.comment: Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:Articles lacking sources from 2026-01]] <!--categories--> [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]
<!--templates--> <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:Articles lacking sources from 2026-01]] <!--categories--> [[Category:categories missing wikidata]][[Category:maintainence categories]]

<!--templates--> <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:Articles lacking sources from 2026-01]] <!--categories--> [[Category:categories missing wikidata]][[Category:maintainence categories]][[Category:maintainence categories]]

<!--templates--> <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:Articles lacking sources from 2026-01]] <!--categories--> [[Category:categories missing wikidata]][[Category:maintainence categories]][[Category:maintainence categories]][[Category:articles with]]
